message:
feat(Python): Implement 5 compilation-related CPython modules in Zig

- asdl.zig: ASDL sequences, node types, arena allocator, visitor pattern (~450 lines)
- assemble.zig: Bytecode assembler, basic blocks, instruction emission (~640 lines)
- bytecodes.zig: Python 3.12+ opcode definitions, metadata, stack effects (~575 lines)
- codegen.zig: Code generator, compiler units, scope management (~610 lines)
- flowgraph.zig: Control flow graph, dominator analysis, loop detection (~730 lines)

Combined ~3000 lines of idiomatic Zig code for Python bytecode compilation.
